ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
function $(rule){
	return java.getElements(rule);
}
var tab_name="",v_list=[];
//获取所有线路❗️
tab=$('.detail-right__volumes@.row')
for(i=0;i<tab.length;i++){
	//获取播放列表❗️
	list=$('.detail-right__volumes')[i]
	list=list.select('.row>div')
 for(j in list){
		 //获取播放链接和标题
		 if(String(list[j]).match(/volume-title/)){
		 	  volume_name=`${list[j].text()}`
		 	  v_list.push(JSON.stringify({
			   name:volume_name,href:'',volume:true
		   }))
		 }else{
		 	  text=list[j].text();
		   url=list[j].select('a').attr('href');
		   v_list.push(JSON.stringify({
			   name:text,href:url,volume:false
		   }))
		 }
	 }
}
v_list
</js>
